Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Starhammer]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — Starhammer is the leader of the Advocates and has hunted and killed the narrator in a previous life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Starhammer is an entity that can label individuals as criminals.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 1''' — Starhammer is a hero who carries damaged star-cruisers to safety.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 1''' — Starhammer experienced overpowering relief upon learning Leilari was safe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Starhammer is a figure mentioned by Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Starhammer is a member of the High Council of the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Starhammer can activate a Temporal Field to slow the world around him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Starhammer is a person or entity that may reach Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Starhammer is a powerful individual known for crushing an astral dragon in one blow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Starhammer once made a bid to take over the universe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — Starhammer's wife was saved by the Lagomorph Contract.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — Starhammer has Archmage-level protection against detection spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 13''' — Starhammer has a chiseled jawline and muscular physique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — Starhammer is a protector and the guardian of the Free Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — Starhammer can see through objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — Starhammer can fire optical beams from his eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — Starhammer is a character who can hover and fly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — Starhammer can scan individuals through their masks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — Starhammer is capable of flying at top speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Starhammer was held in the prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Starhammer possesses a Temporal Field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Starhammer has a Subspace Drive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Starhammer's Subspace Drive is sized for a single person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Starhammer escaped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Starhammer is a powerful entity that can kill generations of Perfected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Starhammer is a powerful entity that the narrator fears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Starhammer is a robot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Mell made Starhammer so someone would never forget her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Varic has fought Starhammer before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — Starhammer is a powerful individual whose magic countermeasures are flawless against Archmagi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — Starhammer's presence felt like being hunted by a World Spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — Starhammer is noted to be stronger than the narrator dared to consider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 25''' — Starhammer is a real threat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 27''' — Starhammer possesses an internal Drive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Starhammer once killed the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Starhammer is associated with the Advocate organization.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — Starhammer has received massive upgrades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Starhammer is an android.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Starhammer has an Evolution Engine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Starhammer wears a signature gold cape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Starhammer is an exception to most rules.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Starhammer has not made any moves to expand his territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Starhammer is a leader of a superior fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Starhammer heard of the Iron Legion's encounter with The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — Starhammer may be coming with ships from the Union or the Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — Starhammer is a commander who issued orders to his ships during the conflict.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Starhammer possesses a skintight shield that normally coats his skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Starhammer has a processor implant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Starhammer's pain responses are muted compared to a human's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — Starhammer killed a Lichborn woman in powered armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Starhammer was warped by the Temporal Field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Starhammer's primary directive is to protect everyone, especially Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Starhammer's Evolution Engine has activated six times.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Starhammer's mind and personality can shift when his Evolution Engine activates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Starhammer has blue eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Starhammer killed Clockworker by punching through him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — Starhammer is a target the protagonists intend to catch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 42''' — Starhammer is an Advocate who addressed a mass meeting of his fellow Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Starhammer is described as being very strong.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Undermaker has called Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Starhammer's thoughts became faster and cleaner after his evolution.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Starhammer is difficult to affect with magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Starhammer is a broad, muscular man with pale skin, blue eyes, and black hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Starhammer hovers a few inches above the floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Starhammer wears a suit with a glowing 'A' on his chest and a golden cape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Starhammer has an evolving Aethertech body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Starhammer has access to a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Starhammer is an android who wears his emotions on his sleeve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Starhammer has synthetic blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Starhammer's Temporal Field can be enhanced by sacrificing system power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Starhammer is married to Leilari.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Starhammer's eyes can glow bright white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Starhammer is capable of a full-power state.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Starhammer is a Nova-Bot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — Starhammer is a dangerous individual who fights Varic and Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — Starhammer is actually a Nova-Bot under his disguise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — Starhammer uses optical beams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — Starhammer intends to take the narrator in to prevent them from causing trouble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 49''' — Starhammer is a Subline star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 49''' — Starhammer looked at the narrator impassively.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 49''' — Starhammer intended to execute the narrator for crimes against the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Starhammer may disable The Last Horizon if the Captain cannot take control of it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Starhammer is a champion designed by Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Starhammer can track Mell through wishes and dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Starhammer supervised the interrogation of Varic Vallenar remotely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Starhammer may execute the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Starhammer has a personal shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Starhammer is an android created by Doctor Nova.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Starhammer has mechanical parts visible from damage on his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Starhammer has a scarlet-edged wound in his chest left by Worldslayer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 53''' — Starhammer is being rejected by his wife and his creator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — Starhammer possesses raw durability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Starhammer is imprisoned in a spell-anchor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Starhammer has recently taken actions that have caused concern within the Union.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — Starhammer is a person or entity that can be searched for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — Starhammer previously cobbled together a fleet with the Galactic Union and the Karoshan Alliance to kill the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Starhammer is currently being held in The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Starhammer is a person who forced the D’Niss to summon Esh’kinaar and the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Starhammer is an enemy capable of hitting hard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Starhammer is a corrupt individual from the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 27''' — Raion has previously fought Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The fleet's composition was primarily made up of smaller ships and a handful of carriers and cruisers when facing Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — Starhammer is an object that the Captain has kept.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — Starhammer led an allied fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — Starhammer is a person Horizon refuses to talk about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — Starhammer is a being that went out of control and destroyed Advocate Headquarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — Starhammer was sealed in an Absolute Burial spell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Starhammer is experiencing madness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Starhammer was considered a threat to peace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Starhammer's destruction has made Advocate headquarters a darker place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Starhammer wears a white skintight outfit with purple accents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Starhammer's outfit features a seven-pointed star instead of the Advocate A.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Starhammer's body has been reanimated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Starhammer is a starship engaged in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Starhammer's body is irreplaceable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Starhammer's body was kept as a trophy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Zenith Starship's World Spirit is obsessed with glorious victory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Starhammer is a construct that Mell controls and has inhuman eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — The Engineer tried to dive in Starhammer’s body.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
